title: Wee Willie Winkie
writer: Ernest Pascal, Julien Josephson, Rudyard Kipling
actors: Shirley Temple, Victor McLaglen, C. Aubrey Smith
plot: Priscilla Williams, a young girl living with her widowed mother and paternal grandfather at the post he commands in northern India, becomes enamored of military life and embroiled in brewing rebellion against the crown in the earl...
